description_long: This object consists of four medium-sized, irregularly shaped stones arranged in a linear sequence. Each stone has a rounded, somewhat blocky form with subtle variations in size and color, ranging from pale gray and off-white to muted pinkish and brownish tones. The surfaces are matte and display a natural, unpolished texture with visible mottling and slight discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements. The stones appear solid and dense, with no visible cavities or artificial markings, and their edges are gently worn rather than sharply angular. The arrangement suggests they could serve as a low barrier or boundary marker in an urban or landscaped setting. The overall impression is of weathered, naturally sourced stones that have been placed together for functional or decorative purposes.
description: A set of four rounded, weathered stones in muted gray, white, and pinkish hues, arranged in a linear sequence with a natural, matte texture.
description_view_0: Four stones are visible from the side, showing their rounded tops and subtle color differences, with the front surfaces facing forward.
description_view_1: The stones are viewed end-on, appearing as a single file with their narrowest profiles visible and color transitions along their sides.
description_view_2: The stones are seen from the opposite side of view 0, revealing the backs and a similar arrangement of colors and shapes.
description_view_3: Viewed from the opposite end of view 1, the stones again appear in a line, with the farthest stone's back surface most prominent.
attribute_location: urban park border or sidewalk edge
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or in a linear boundary arrangement on the ground
attribute_pattern: Natural mottling and subtle color banding with no regular or artificial patterns; each stone displays unique, irregular surface coloration.
attribute_weathering: Surfaces are matte and slightly rough, with gentle rounding and discoloration indicating moderate weathering and prolonged outdoor exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural landscaping elements or contrasts gently with paved surfaces, often partially embedded in soil or grass.
